title: Hospeda Public Web Application (web2) - Built from Scratch

tasks.title: Initialize Astro project scaffolding for apps/web2
tasks.description: Create apps/web2 with package.json (name: hospeda-web2), astro.config.mjs (Astro 5, React integration, Vercel adapter, trailingSlash: always, port 4322), tsconfig.json (extends typescript-config/app-base.json), biome.json (extends biome-config). Add workspace dependencies: @repo/schemas, @repo/i18n, @repo/db, @repo/service-core, @repo/billing, @repo/auth-ui, @repo/icons, @repo/config, @repo/utils, @repo/logger. Create empty src/ directory structure: pages/, components/, layouts/, styles/, lib/, hooks/, store/, server/, assets/. Verify dev server starts. Tests: verify package.json has correct deps, astro config loads.

subtasks.title: Create package.json with all workspace deps

tasks.title: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 and design system CSS variables
tasks.description: Set up Tailwind CSS v4 with @tailwindcss/vite plugin. Create src/styles/global.css with ALL CSS variables from SPEC-005 Section 3.1: colors (primary river blue #2196F3, secondary green #4CAF50, accent sand #D7CCC8, neutrals, semantics), spacing (8px grid), border-radius, shadows, typography (Playfair Display serif + Inter sans-serif), transitions, z-index scale. Set up Google Fonts loading with preconnect and font-display:swap. Create tailwind.config.ts with content globs. Prepare dark mode variables (not implemented). Tests: CSS variables render correctly, font loading configured.

subtasks.title: Create global.css with all CSS variables
Configure Tailwind v4 with vite plugin
Set up Google Fonts (Playfair Display + Inter)

tasks.title: Set up Vitest testing infrastructure
tasks.description: Configure vitest.config.ts using Astro's getViteConfig. Set up jsdom environment. Create test/setup.tsx with testing-library/jest-dom. Add @testing-library/react, @testing-library/dom, @testing-library/user-event, @vitest/coverage-v8 as devDeps. Create test utility helpers (renderWithProviders, mockLocale). Verify test runner works with a smoke test. Tests: smoke test passes, coverage reports generate.

tasks.title: Configure environment variables and validation
tasks.description: Create src/env.ts with Zod schema validation for HOSPEDA_API_URL, HOSPEDA_SITE_URL (with PUBLIC_ fallbacks). Create src/env.d.ts for Astro env type declarations. Set up Vite plugin for env variable mapping (HOSPEDA_* to PUBLIC_*). Handle monorepo .env.local loading. Tests: validation rejects invalid env, accepts valid env.

subtasks.title: Set up Vite env mapping plugin

tasks.title: Create animation system CSS
tasks.description: Implement all keyframes from SPEC-005 Section 11.1: fadeIn, slideUp, scaleIn, shimmer. Add prefers-reduced-motion media query that disables animations. Create Tailwind animation utilities (animate-fadeIn, animate-slideUp, animate-scaleIn, animate-shimmer). Add transition utility classes. Tests: animations defined, reduced-motion disables them.

tasks.title: Create BaseLayout.astro
tasks.description: Create layouts/BaseLayout.astro as the HTML shell. Props: { title, description, image?, noindex?, locale }. Include: DOCTYPE, html lang attribute from locale, head with charset/viewport, CSS variables import, Google Fonts links, View Transitions meta tag, slot for SEO component, slot for page content. Add skip link 'Skip to main content' targeting #main-content. Wrap content in header/main/footer slots. Tests: renders HTML structure, includes meta tags, skip link present, lang attribute set.

tasks.title: Create Container.astro component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Container.astro. Props: { size?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'|'xl', class? }. Renders a div with max-width based on size (sm:640px, md:768px, lg:1024px, xl:1280px) and horizontal auto margins. Default size: lg. Tests: renders with correct max-width class per size variant.

subtasks.title: Write tests for all size variants

tasks.title: Create Section.astro component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Section.astro. Props: { title?, subtitle?, class?, id? }. Renders semantic section element with optional heading (h2) and subtitle paragraph. Uses spacing tokens. Tests: renders title/subtitle, renders without title, applies custom classes.

tasks.title: Create Header.astro with navigation
tasks.description: Create layouts/Header.astro. Props: { user?, locale }. Includes: logo (link to /[locale]/), main nav links (Alojamientos, Destinos, Eventos, Blog), search trigger, auth area (signin/signup or UserNav), mobile hamburger button. ARIA: header role='banner', nav role='navigation' aria-label='Main'. Responsive: full nav on desktop, hamburger on mobile. Tests: renders nav links, ARIA attributes present, responsive breakpoints.

tasks.title: Create Footer.astro
tasks.description: Create layouts/Footer.astro. Props: { locale }. Includes: site links organized by category (Explorar, Informacion, Legal), social media links, newsletter CTA area (slot for NewsletterCTA component), copyright. ARIA: footer role='contentinfo'. Tests: renders link categories, ARIA attributes, social links.

tasks.title: Create Breadcrumb.astro component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Breadcrumb.astro. Props: { items: { label: string, href: string }[] }. Renders nav with aria-label='Breadcrumb', ordered list of links, last item has aria-current='page'. Generates JSON-LD BreadcrumbList structured data. Tests: renders items, ARIA attributes, JSON-LD output valid.

tasks.title: Create Button.astro component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Button.astro. Props: { variant: 'primary'|'secondary'|'outline'|'ghost', size: 'sm'|'md'|'lg', disabled?: boolean, loading?: boolean, type?: 'button'|'submit', class? }. Uses CSS variables for theming. Loading state shows spinner + disabled. Focus visible outline. Tests: all variants render, loading state, disabled state, focus styles.

tasks.title: Create form input components
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Input.astro (text input), components/ui/Textarea.astro (multi-line), components/ui/Select.astro (dropdown). All share pattern: label association via for attribute, required indicator, error state with aria-describedby linking to FormError, focus-visible styles. Props include label, required?, error?, name, id plus native input attrs. Tests: label association, error rendering, required indicator, ARIA attributes.

tasks.title: Create Checkbox, Radio, Label, and FormError components
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Checkbox.astro, Radio.astro, Label.astro (with required indicator), FormError.astro (with message and id for aria-describedby). Tests: renders correctly, label required indicator, error message with id.

tasks.title: Create Badge.astro component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Badge.astro. Props: { label: string, variant: 'primary'|'secondary'|'outline', class? }. Small label/tag with color variants. Tests: renders variants correctly.

tasks.title: Create Skeleton.astro loading component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Skeleton.astro. Props: { type: 'card'|'text'|'image', count?: number, class? }. Uses shimmer animation. Card skeleton includes image placeholder + text lines. Text skeleton shows line placeholders. Image skeleton shows rectangle. Tests: renders each type, count creates multiple, shimmer animation applied.

tasks.title: Create EmptyState.astro component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/EmptyState.astro. Props: { title: string, message: string, cta?: { label: string, href: string }, illustration?: string }. Centered layout with optional illustration, heading, description, CTA button. Tests: renders all parts, optional CTA.

tasks.title: Set up [lang] routing with language detection
tasks.description: Create pages/index.astro that redirects to /{detected-locale}/ based on Accept-Language header or default ES. Create pages/[lang]/ directory. Implement getStaticPaths for supported locales (es, en, pt). Validate lang param against supported locales. Tests: redirect from / to /es/ by default, language detection from headers, invalid locale handling.

tasks.title: Create Astro middleware for locale and auth
tasks.description: Create src/middleware.ts. Validate [lang] param against supported locales (es, en, pt), redirect invalid to /es/. Set locale in Astro.locals. For /mi-cuenta/ routes, check authentication and redirect to /[lang]/auth/signin/?returnUrl=... if not authenticated. Tests: locale validation, redirect for invalid locale, auth check for protected routes.

subtasks.title: Add auth check for protected routes

tasks.title: Integrate @repo/i18n package with Astro
tasks.description: Create src/lib/i18n.ts with helper functions: getTranslations(locale, namespace), t(key) helper. Create React hook useTranslation(locale, namespace) for client components. Set up namespace loading (common, nav, auth, accommodations, destinations, events, blog, account). Handle fallback when translation missing (show ES + badge). Tests: translation loading, key lookup, fallback behavior, namespace loading.

subtasks.title: Create i18n helper for Astro pages

tasks.title: Create SEO meta tags component
tasks.description: Create components/seo/SEOHead.astro. Props: { title, description, canonical, image?, noindex?, locale, type?: 'website'|'article' }. Renders: title tag with ' | Hospeda' suffix, meta description, canonical link, OG tags (type, url, title, description, image, locale, site_name), Twitter card (summary_large_image), hreflang tags for all locales (es, en, pt + x-default pointing to ES). Tests: renders all meta tags, hreflang links correct, noindex when set.

subtasks.title: Add OG and Twitter meta tags

tasks.title: Create JSON-LD structured data components
tasks.description: Create components/seo/JsonLd.astro generic wrapper. Create specific helpers: LodgingBusinessJsonLd(accommodation), EventJsonLd(event), ArticleJsonLd(post). Each generates valid schema.org JSON-LD. BreadcrumbList already handled by Breadcrumb component. Tests: valid JSON-LD output for each type, correct schema.org types.

tasks.title: Create AccommodationCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/accommodation/AccommodationCard.astro. Props: { accommodation, showFavorite?, locale }. Renders: featured image (lazy load, aspect ratio), name (h3), type badge, location with MapPin icon, star rating, price display, favorite button slot. Link wraps entire card to /[locale]/alojamientos/[slug]/. Responsive: vertical stack. Semantic heading hierarchy. Tests: renders all fields, link correct, image lazy loads, ARIA.

tasks.title: Create DestinationCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/destination/DestinationCard.astro. Props: { destination, locale }. Renders: featured image, name (h3), summary text, accommodations count, 'Explorar' button. Link to /[locale]/destinos/[slug]/. Tests: renders all fields, link correct.

tasks.title: Create EventCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/event/EventCard.astro. Props: { event, locale }. Renders: featured image, name (h3), category badge, formatted date, location, price info, past event badge if expired. Link to /[locale]/eventos/[slug]/. Tests: renders all fields, past event badge, date formatting.

tasks.title: Create BlogPostCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/blog/BlogPostCard.astro. Props: { post, variant?: 'default'|'featured', locale }. Renders: featured image, title (h3), excerpt, author with avatar, date, reading time, category badge. Featured variant is larger. Link to /[locale]/publicaciones/[slug]/. Tests: renders all fields, featured variant larger.

tasks.title: Create ReviewCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/review/ReviewCard.astro. Props: { review, showEntity?: boolean }. Renders: user avatar + name, star rating (1-5 filled/empty stars), review title, content text, date, optional entity reference link. Tests: renders all fields, star rating display, optional entity.

tasks.title: Create HeroSection.astro
tasks.description: Create components/content/HeroSection.astro. Props: { image: string, title: string, subtitle?: string, cta?: { label: string, href: string }, overlay?: boolean }. Full-width hero with background image, overlay gradient, title, subtitle, optional CTA button, optional search slot. Responsive image sizing. Tests: renders image/title/subtitle/CTA, responsive.

tasks.title: Create FeaturedSection.astro
tasks.description: Create components/content/FeaturedSection.astro. Props: { title: string, viewAllHref?: string, viewAllLabel?: string, columns?: 2|3|4, class? }. Section with title, 'Ver mas' link, responsive grid slot for cards (3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile). Tests: renders title, grid layout, view all link.

tasks.title: Create AmenitiesList.astro
tasks.description: Create components/accommodation/AmenitiesList.astro. Props: { amenities: Array<{ name, icon, slug }> }. Grid of amenity icons with labels, using @repo/icons. Responsive grid (4 cols desktop, 3 tablet, 2 mobile). Tests: renders amenities with icons, responsive.

tasks.title: Create PricingCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/content/PricingCard.astro. Props: { plan: { name, price, currency, features, cta }, highlighted?: boolean }. Card with plan name, price display, features checklist, CTA button. Highlighted variant has accent border/shadow. Tests: renders plan info, highlighted variant, features list.

tasks.title: Create TestimonialCard.astro
tasks.description: Create components/content/TestimonialCard.astro. Props: { quote: string, author: string, image?: string, role?: string }. Blockquote with decorative quotes, author info. Tests: renders quote and author.

tasks.title: Create Toast notification system
tasks.description: Create store/toast-store.ts using Zustand with add/remove/clear actions. Toast types: success, error, warning, info. Auto-dismiss with configurable duration (default 5s). Create components/ui/Toast.client.tsx rendering toasts via portal, positioned top-right. aria-live='polite' for screen readers. Slide-in animation. Tests: store add/remove, auto-dismiss, rendering, ARIA.

tasks.title: Create Modal.client.tsx using native dialog
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Modal.client.tsx. Props: { title, children, onClose, open }. Uses native <dialog> element with showModal()/close(). Focus trap (focus stays inside modal). Close on Escape key. Close on backdrop click. aria-modal='true', role='dialog'. Transitions for open/close. Tests: open/close, focus trap, Escape key, backdrop click, ARIA.

tasks.title: Create Tabs.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Tabs.client.tsx. Props: { tabs: Array<{ id, label, content }>, defaultTab? }. ARIA pattern: role='tablist', role='tab' with aria-selected, role='tabpanel' with aria-labelledby. Keyboard nav: arrow keys switch tabs. Tests: tab switching, ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation.

tasks.title: Create AccordionFAQ.client.tsx using native details
tasks.description: Create components/ui/AccordionFAQ.client.tsx. Props: { items: Array<{ question, answer }> }. Uses native <details>/<summary> elements. aria-expanded, aria-controls attributes. Only one open at a time (optional). Tests: expand/collapse, ARIA attributes.

tasks.title: Create MobileMenu.client.tsx using native dialog
tasks.description: Create components/ui/MobileMenu.client.tsx. Props: { navItems: Array<{ label, href }>, locale, user? }. Slide-in menu using <dialog>. Focus trap, Escape to close. Nav items with links. Auth section (signin/signup or user info). Tests: open/close, focus trap, renders nav items.

tasks.title: Create ShareButtons.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/ui/ShareButtons.client.tsx. Props: { url, title, text }. Uses Web Share API when available, fallback to social links (WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter). Copy to clipboard button. Tests: renders share buttons, copy to clipboard works.

tasks.title: Create FavoriteButton.client.tsx with optimistic updates
tasks.description: Create components/ui/FavoriteButton.client.tsx. Props: { entityId, entityType, initialFavorited?, locale }. Optimistic toggle (heart fills/unfills immediately). Auth check: if not authenticated, show AuthRequiredPopover. API call to toggle bookmark. Revert on error + error toast. Uses @repo/icons HeartIcon. Tests: toggle state, optimistic update, auth popover trigger, error revert.

tasks.title: Create AuthRequiredPopover.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/auth/AuthRequiredPopover.client.tsx. Props: { message, onClose, locale }. Contextual popover (not modal) positioned relative to trigger. Shows message, 'Iniciar sesion' link (with returnUrl), 'Registrarse' link. Close on Escape key, close on click outside. role='dialog', aria-label. Tests: renders message and links, close behaviors.

tasks.title: Create ViewToggle.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/ui/ViewToggle.client.tsx. Props: { defaultView: 'grid'|'map', onChange: (view) => void }. Two toggle buttons (grid icon, map icon). Accessible toggle group. Tests: toggle state, callback fires.

tasks.title: Create SearchBar.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/search/SearchBar.client.tsx. Props: { onSearch, placeholder, locale }. Text input with search icon. Debounced input (300ms). On Enter or click search, navigates to /[locale]/busqueda/?q={query}. Optional autocomplete dropdown (grouped by entity type). Tests: input handling, debounce, submit navigation.

tasks.title: Create UserNav.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/auth/UserNav.client.tsx. Props: { user, locale }. Dropdown with user avatar, name, menu items (Mi Cuenta, Favoritos, Mis Resenas, Preferencias, Cerrar sesion). Accessible dropdown pattern with aria-expanded, keyboard nav. Tests: renders user info, dropdown open/close, menu items.

tasks.title: Create NewsletterCTA.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/newsletter/NewsletterCTA.client.tsx. Props: { locale }. For unauthenticated: promo text + subscribe button triggering AuthRequiredPopover. For authenticated: NewsletterToggle with checkbox to opt in/out. Optimistic toggle with API call. Tests: renders correct state for auth/unauth, toggle works.

tasks.title: Create Homepage
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/index.astro. Uses BaseLayout. Hero section with regional imagery, tagline, SearchBar (client:load). FeaturedSection for accommodations (6 items, AccommodationCard), destinations (4 items, DestinationCard), events (4 items, EventCard), blog posts (3 items, BlogPostCard). Each section has 'Ver mas' link. Server Islands for dynamic 'recommended' section if authenticated. SEOHead with homepage meta. Tests: page renders, all sections present, responsive.

tasks.title: Create About Us page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/quienes-somos.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. About content: mission, values, team section. Illustrations. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, breadcrumbs present.

tasks.title: Create Benefits page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/beneficios.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Benefits for tourists and owners with icons/illustrations. CTA to pricing. SEOHead. Tests: page renders.

tasks.title: Create Terms & Conditions page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/terminos-condiciones.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Legal content layout with sections. SEOHead. Tests: page renders.

tasks.title: Create Privacy Policy page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/privacidad.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Legal content layout. SEOHead. Tests: page renders.

tasks.title: Create Contact page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/contacto.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. ContactForm (React island, client:idle). Contact info sidebar (email, social). SEOHead. Tests: page renders, form island present.

tasks.title: Create ContactForm.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/forms/ContactForm.client.tsx. React Hook Form + Zod validation. Fields: name (min 2), email (valid email), subject, message (min 20). Submit to API endpoint. Loading state on submit button. Success toast on complete. Error handling. All fields disabled during submission. Tests: validation rules, submit flow, loading state, error handling.

tasks.title: Create Tourist Pricing page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/precios/turistas.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Benefits section. PricingCards for Free, Plus ($5k ARS/month), VIP ($15k ARS/month). Features comparison. CTA buttons. Currency display based on locale. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, plans display, currency formatting.

tasks.title: Create Owner Pricing page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/precios/propietarios.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Owner benefits. PricingCards for Basic ($15k), Professional ($35k), Premium ($75k). Testimonials section. Strong CTA. Currency display. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, plans display.

tasks.title: Create HTML Sitemap page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/sitemap.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Organized links to all main pages by section (Alojamientos, Destinos, Eventos, Blog, Informacion). SEOHead. Tests: page renders, links present.

tasks.title: Create 404 error page
tasks.description: Create pages/404.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout (simplified). Custom illustration (regional theme). Friendly message. Link back to homepage. SEOHead with noindex. Tests: page renders, home link present.

tasks.title: Create 500 error page
tasks.description: Create pages/500.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout (simplified). Custom illustration. Error message. Retry/home links. SEOHead with noindex. Tests: page renders.

tasks.title: Create Accommodation List page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/alojamientos/index.astro. SSR. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Grid of AccommodationCards (3 cols desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile). FilterSidebar React island (client:load). Sort dropdown (Featured, Price asc/desc, Rating, Recent). ViewToggle for grid/map. Pagination. URL query params for filters. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, grid layout, sort options.

subtasks.title: Add card grid with responsive layout

tasks.title: Create FilterSidebar.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/accommodation/FilterSidebar.client.tsx. Props: { filters, onApply, locale }. Filter sections: Type (checkboxes), Price Range (min/max inputs), Destination (select), Amenities (checkboxes), Rating (min stars). URL query param sync (update URL on filter change). Active filter badges with individual clear buttons. Clear all filters button. Tests: filter apply, URL sync, clear individual/all, active badges.

tasks.title: Create Accommodation Detail page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/alojamientos/[slug].astro. SSG with ISR. Breadcrumbs (Inicio > Alojamientos > {name}). Photo gallery (ImageGallery island, client:visible). Name, type badge, location, rating, price. Description (rich text from TipTap JSON). AmenitiesList. Location map slot (MapView, client:visible). Contact form slot. Reviews section slot. AccordionFAQ. Similar accommodations. ShareButtons + FavoriteButton. JSON-LD LodgingBusiness. SEOHead. Tests: page renders with data, breadcrumbs, SEO.

tasks.title: Create Accommodation by Type page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/alojamientos/tipo/[type].astro. SSR. Validates type against AccommodationType enum. Breadcrumbs (Inicio > Alojamientos > {type}). Reuses AccommodationCard grid. Filtered by type. Pagination. SEOHead with type-specific title. Tests: page renders, correct type filter, invalid type handling.

tasks.title: Create ImageGallery.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/ui/ImageGallery.client.tsx. Props: { images: Array<{ src, alt }> }. Main image display + thumbnail strip. Click thumbnail to change main image. Click main image opens lightbox (Modal). Lightbox has prev/next navigation, keyboard arrow keys. Touch swipe on mobile. Tests: thumbnail click, lightbox open/close, keyboard nav, renders images.

tasks.title: Create MapView.client.tsx with Leaflet
tasks.description: Create components/map/MapView.client.tsx. Props: { markers: Array<{ id, lat, lng, popup }>, center, zoom }. Integrates react-leaflet. TileLayer with OpenStreetMap tiles. Markers with popup content. Marker clustering for dense areas. Responsive height. Tests: map renders, markers display, popup opens on click.

tasks.title: Create Destination List page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/destinos/index.astro. SSG. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Grid of DestinationCards. Search bar for filtering by name. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, cards display.

tasks.title: Create Destination Detail page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/destinos/[...path].astro. SSG with ISR. Breadcrumbs (Inicio > Destinos > {name}). Hero with image. Tabbed/sectioned content: Description, Gallery, Climate info, How to get there, Attractions (what to do), Accommodations in destination, Events in destination, Related posts. Map. ShareButtons + FavoriteButton. Empty states for missing sections. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, tabs work, empty states.

tasks.title: Create Event List page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/eventos/index.astro. SSR. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. CalendarView React island (client:visible). Event list below calendar. Filters: Date Range, Category, Location, Free/Paid. Upcoming/Past toggle. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, filter UI present.

tasks.title: Create CalendarView.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/event/CalendarView.client.tsx. Props: { events: Array<{ date, id, name }>, onDateSelect, locale }. Monthly calendar grid. Highlighted dates with events. Click date to filter event list. Prev/next month navigation. Accessible: aria-label on dates, keyboard navigation. Tests: calendar renders, date selection, month navigation, ARIA.

subtasks.title: Add monthly grid with event highlights

tasks.title: Create Event Detail page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/eventos/[slug].astro. SSG with ISR. Breadcrumbs (Inicio > Eventos > {name}). Event info: name, category badge, date/time, location. Image/gallery. Description. Schedule/agenda. Ticket/pricing info with external link. Organizer info. Related events. Past event badge ('Evento finalizado'). ShareButtons + FavoriteButton. JSON-LD Event. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, past event handling.

tasks.title: Create Blog List page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/publicaciones/index.astro. SSR. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Featured post (large BlogPostCard). Grid of recent posts (2-3 cols). Category sidebar/filter. Pagination. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, featured post larger, category filter.

tasks.title: Create Blog Post Detail page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/publicaciones/[slug].astro. SSG with ISR. Breadcrumbs (Inicio > Blog > {category} > {title}). Featured image. Title, author avatar+name, date, reading time. Full content rendered from TipTap JSON (uses TipTapRenderer). Tags section. ShareButtons. Related posts (3-6 items). JSON-LD Article. SEOHead. Tests: page renders, content renders, tags display.

tasks.title: Create TipTap JSON to HTML renderer
tasks.description: Create src/lib/tiptap-renderer.ts. Server-side function that converts TipTap/ProseMirror JSON to HTML. Support node types: heading (h1-h6), paragraph, bulletList, orderedList, listItem, blockquote, codeBlock, image, hardBreak. Support marks: bold, italic, link, code, underline. Tests: renders each node type, handles nested structures, handles empty/null input.

tasks.title: Create Search Results page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/busqueda.astro. SSR. Uses BaseLayout. Breadcrumbs. Reads ?q= query param. Results grouped by entity type (Alojamientos, Destinos, Eventos, Publicaciones) with counts. Each group shows entity cards. Empty state with illustration + popular search suggestions when no results. SEOHead with noindex. Tests: page renders, groups results, empty state.

tasks.title: Create Sign In page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/auth/signin.astro. SSG, noindex. Uses BaseLayout. Email + password form. Social signin buttons (Google, Facebook). 'Olvidaste tu contrasena?' link. 'No tenes cuenta? Registrate' link. Handles returnUrl query param for post-login redirect. SEOHead with noindex. Tests: page renders, form fields present, links correct.

tasks.title: Create Sign Up page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/auth/signup.astro. SSG, noindex. Uses BaseLayout. Registration form: first name, last name, email, password. Social signup buttons. Password requirements displayed. Terms checkbox. Link to signin. SEOHead with noindex. Tests: page renders, form fields, terms checkbox.

tasks.title: Create Forgot Password page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/auth/forgot-password.astro. SSG, noindex. Email input form. Submit sends reset email. Success message. Link to signin. Tests: page renders, form present.

tasks.title: Create Reset Password page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/auth/reset-password.astro. SSR (token validation). New password + confirm password form. Token validation server-side. Success redirect to signin. Tests: page renders, token validation.

tasks.title: Create Verify Email page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/auth/verify-email.astro. SSR (token validation). Shows verification status (success/error/expired). Link to signin on success. Tests: page renders, status display.

tasks.title: Create Account Dashboard page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/index.astro. SSR, auth required. Uses BaseLayout. Profile summary (avatar, name, email, edit button). Stats (favorites count, reviews count). Recent activity. Navigation to sub-pages. SEOHead with noindex. Tests: page renders, auth redirect works.

tasks.title: Create Edit Profile page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/editar.astro. SSR, auth required. Profile edit form (React island): name, email (readonly), avatar upload. Save button with loading state. Success/error toast. Tests: page renders, form pre-filled.

tasks.title: Create Favorites page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/favoritos.astro. SSR, auth required. Tabs by entity type (Alojamientos, Destinos, Eventos, Publicaciones). Grid of favorited entity cards with remove button. Empty state per tab. Tests: page renders, tabs work, empty states.

tasks.title: Create My Reviews page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/resenas.astro. SSR, auth required. List of user's ReviewCards. Empty state. Tests: page renders, reviews list.

tasks.title: Create Preferences page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/preferencias.astro. SSR, auth required. Language selector dropdown (ES, EN, PT). Theme toggle (light only, dark 'Coming soon'). Currency selector (ARS, BRL, USD). Newsletter toggle. Save button persists to user profile. Tests: page renders, settings display, save works.

tasks.title: Create Subscription page
tasks.description: Create pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/suscripcion.astro. SSR, auth required. Shows current plan (Free/Plus/VIP). Plan features. Upgrade/downgrade CTAs linking to pricing pages or payment flow. Billing info if subscribed. Tests: page renders, current plan displays.

tasks.title: Create ReviewForm.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/review/ReviewForm.client.tsx. Props: { entityId, entityType, locale }. React Hook Form + Zod. Star rating selector (1-5, clickable stars). Title input. Textarea (min 20 chars). Photo upload section (max 5 images). Submit to API. Loading state. Success toast + review appears. Already reviewed check. Tests: validation, star selection, submit, photo limit, duplicate review error.

tasks.title: Create ReviewList.client.tsx
tasks.description: Create components/review/ReviewList.client.tsx. Props: { entityId, entityType, locale }. Fetches reviews from API. Renders ReviewCards. Sort options (newest, highest, lowest). Pagination. Write review CTA (triggers ReviewForm modal for authenticated, AuthRequiredPopover for guests). Tests: renders reviews, pagination, sort.

tasks.title: Create PriceDisplay component
tasks.description: Create components/ui/PriceDisplay.astro (and .client.tsx for interactive). Props: { amountARS: number, locale: string, userCurrency?: string, showDisclaimer?: boolean }. Currency resolution: 1) user preference, 2) locale-derived (ES->ARS, EN->USD, PT->BRL). Format with Intl.NumberFormat. Show disclaimer for converted prices. Tests: formatting per currency, conversion, disclaimer display.

tasks.title: Configure @astrojs/sitemap for XML sitemap
tasks.description: Configure @astrojs/sitemap in astro.config.mjs. Include all public routes. Exclude /auth/ and /mi-cuenta/ paths. Set update frequencies (daily for dynamic, weekly for static). Set priorities (homepage 1.0, entity pages 0.8, static 0.6). Tests: sitemap generates, excludes private routes.

tasks.title: Create robots.txt
tasks.description: Create public/robots.txt. Allow all crawlers. Disallow /mi-cuenta/ and /auth/. Reference sitemap.xml. Tests: correct directives present.

tasks.title: Set up View Transitions for page navigation
tasks.description: Configure Astro View Transitions in BaseLayout. Add view-transition-name to hero images for card-to-detail morphing. Customize transition duration (0.3s default, 0.5s hero). Add crossfade for tab content. Progressive enhancement fallback. Tests: transitions configured, fallback works.

tasks.title: Implement navigation progress indicator
tasks.description: Add top-of-page progress bar during page navigation. Thin colored bar at top. Shows during View Transition navigation. Uses CSS animation. Accessible (aria-hidden since decorative). Tests: progress bar appears during navigation.

tasks.title: Optimize font loading
tasks.description: Add preconnect links for Google Fonts in BaseLayout. Set font-display:swap on all font faces. Preload critical fonts (Inter 400, 600, 700). Add fallback font metrics to minimize CLS. Tests: preconnect present, font-display set, preload links.

tasks.title: Configure image optimization with astro:assets
tasks.description: Configure astro:assets Image component. Set up image.remotePatterns for DB images in astro.config. Create reusable OptimizedImage.astro wrapper with lazy loading, responsive srcset (320w, 640w, 1024w, 1920w), width/height for CLS prevention, WebP format. LQIP blur placeholders for hero images. Tests: images optimize, srcset generates.

tasks.title: Implement auth middleware for protected routes
tasks.description: Enhance src/middleware.ts to check Better Auth session for /mi-cuenta/ routes. If not authenticated, redirect to /[lang]/auth/signin/?returnUrl={current path}. Pass user data to Astro.locals for use in pages. Tests: redirects unauthenticated, allows authenticated, sets locals.user.

tasks.title: Create accessibility automated tests
tasks.description: Set up axe-core integration for automated accessibility testing. Create test suite that renders key pages and runs axe checks: homepage, accommodation detail, destination detail, event detail, blog post, auth pages. Verify ARIA landmarks, heading hierarchy, focus-visible, alt text. Target: 0 violations. Tests: axe passes on all tested pages.

tasks.title: Create SEO validation tests
tasks.description: Create test suite validating SEO across pages. Check: title format ('{Page} | Hospeda'), meta description length (150-160), canonical URLs, OG tags, hreflang tags, JSON-LD validity (parse and validate schema.org types). Tests: meta tags present and valid on key pages.

subtasks.title: Test meta tags on key pages

tasks.title: Create CLAUDE.md for apps/web2
tasks.description: Create apps/web2/CLAUDE.md documenting: architecture overview, directory structure, key commands (dev, build, test), component patterns (Astro vs React), rendering strategy decisions, i18n usage, SEO patterns, testing patterns. Follow existing CLAUDE.md format from other apps. Tests: file exists and is well-structured.
